rationale: The citing paper is an editorial-style assessment of JMR’s scope and domain convergence (2013–2019), while the cited paper is a prior JMR editorial on journal positioning, methodological openness, and review policy—so it could plausibly be a historical/foundational source rather than a purely incidental citation. However, the matched evidence is only a single DOI reference entry with no in-text citation context, so the strength of substantive use cannot be confirmed from the provided data.
